revision.text:
<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year|}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes --><!--
* country = {{{country|}}}
* sortkey = {{{sortkey|}}}
* decadeparent = {{{decadeparent|}}}
* nocat={{{nocat|}}}
* min={{{min|}}}
* dab = {{{dab|}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{YearInCountryPortalBox|Geography|{{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|organizations, places and other things founded or established in '''[[{{#if:{{{dab|}}}|{{{dab}}}{{!}}|}}{{{country}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{year|}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
   ######## End header text
-->{{Navseasoncats|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{Category see also if exists 2|{{{year}}} disestablishments in {{{country}}}|{{Resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} disestablishments in {{{country}}}}}}}
[[Category:{{{year}}} establishments by country{{!}}{{#if: {{{sortkey|}}} |{{{sortkey}}}|{{{country}}}}}]]
{{#ifeq:{{{decadeparent}}}|no<!--
    -->|<!--
    -->|[[Category:{{Resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} establishments in {{{country}}}}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]]<!--
-->}}
{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} < 1000<!--
    -->|[[Category:{{Resolve category redirect|Establishments in {{{country}}} by year}}{{!}}0{{{year}}}]]<!--
    -->|[[Category:{{Resolve category redirect|Establishments in {{{country}}} by year}}{{!}}{{{year}}}]]<!--
-->}}
{{category if exists|{{{year}}} in {{{country}}}|/Establishments}}
}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|Template:EstcatCountry/doc}}
</noinclude>

<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year|}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes --><!--
* country = {{{country|}}}
* sortkey = {{{sortkey|}}}
* decadeparent = {{{decadeparent|}}}
* nocat={{{nocat|}}}
* min={{{min|}}}
* dab = {{{dab|}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{YearInCountryPortalBox|Geography|{{{country}}}|year={{{year}}}}}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|organizations, places and other things founded or established in '''[[{{#if:{{{dab|}}}|{{{dab}}}{{!}}|}}{{{country}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{year|}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
   ######## End header text
-->{{Navseasoncats|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{Category see also if exists 2|{{{year}}} disestablishments in {{{country}}}|{{Resolve category redirect|{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} disestablishments in {{{country}}}}}}}

{{#ifeq:{{{decadeparent}}}|no<!--
    -->|<!--
    -->|<!--
-->}}
{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} < 1000<!--
    -->|<!--
    -->|<!--
-->}}
{{category if exists|{{{year}}} in {{{country}}}|/Establishments}}
}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|Template:EstcatCountry/doc}}
</noinclude>
